description: Policy Engine — measures OPA policy evaluation overhead on MCP requests. Gateway should add minimal latency from policy checks.

tasks.name: Discovery with OPA enabled
tasks.notes: Baseline policy overhead — discovery should complete in <200ms even with OPA evaluation.

tasks.name: Policy eval under concurrent load
tasks.notes: 5 VUs × 20 iterations — OPA should not bottleneck under concurrency.

tasks.name: Policy eval with authenticated request
tasks.notes: Auth + policy in the same request — combined overhead must stay under cap.

tasks.name: Policy eval with large headers
tasks.notes: Extra headers should not cause policy evaluation to slow down.

tasks.name: Rapid-fire policy eval burst
tasks.notes: 50 sequential calls — tests that OPA policy cache stays warm.
